svg.title: Full chess agents system in one view
svg.desc: Combined diagram: main.py starts the loop, router decides the turn, the active player builds context and calls Gemini through llm_backend which parses UCI, the validator checks legality against python-chess, then commits and emits to ARM and logger before looping back to the router.
svg.text: illegal: retry_count + 1, same player, back to router

g.text: board.push → new fen + san, flip player
